description: Phishing templates impersonating identity providers and SSO platforms

templates.name: Okta Suspicious Sign-In Alert
suggested_subject_lines: Okta: New sign-in from Kyiv, Ukraine
[Security Alert] Unrecognized device accessed your Okta account
Action required: Suspicious activity on your company SSO account
templates.notes: Advanced difficulty — lower click rate expected but highest-value target. Listing specific apps (Salesforce, GitHub) accessed increases panic. Use {{.Date}} for realism.

templates.name: Duo Security – Device Re-enrollment
suggested_subject_lines: Action required: re-enroll your device in Duo
Your Duo Mobile enrollment expires soon
Re-verify your device to keep two-factor access
templates.notes: MFA-fatigue / re-enrollment lure. Effective in orgs that already use Duo, where the request looks routine.

templates.name: Okta – Password Expiration
suggested_subject_lines: Reminder: reset your Okta password to avoid lockout
templates.notes: Password-expiry is one of the most clicked lures. Complements the existing Okta verification template.
